title: hieracium symphytaceum subsp. elocatum
intro: Hieracium symphytaceum subsp. elocatum is a subspecies of the Hieracium symphytaceum plant, commonly known as hawkweed. It is a perennial plant native to Europe, and its leaves and flowers are used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium symphytaceum subsp. elocatum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
